name: Nanjing Quanxin Cable Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Quanxin Cable Technology Co., Ltd. develops and produces military optoelectronic transmission products. It offers photoelectric transmission and optical cables; photoelectric transmission cable assemblies; optoelectronic devices, such as optical and electrical connectors; and integrated wiring products. The company also provides optoelectronic system integration products, including avionics and control, and ground remote control terminal; and optical transmission systems. Its products are used in the aviation, aerospace, ships, weapons, and electronics fields. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.
